languages.text: Самым страшным из последователей Хаоса Неделимого, управляемых рукой {name} фон Валанциус, становится звероподобный кровожадный воитель, бывший архимилитант Иждриг Батошски.
The most fearsome of the followers of Chaos Undivided controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.
languages.original_text: Самым страшным из последователей Хаоса Неделимого, управляемых рукой {name} фон Валанциус, становится звероподобный кровожадный воитель, бывший архимилитант Иждриг Батошски.

traits.locale_text: The most fearsome of the followers of Chaos Undivided controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.
The most fearsome of the Chaos warriors controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.
The most fearsome of the Chaos warriors controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.
The most fearsome of the followers of Chaos Undivided controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.

languages.text: ヴァランシウス家の混沌軍団を率いる{name}の最も恐ろしい戦士は、獣のような血に飢えた戦士、かつての軍団長イズドリーグ・バトシュスキー自身だった。
languages.original_text: The most fearsome of the Chaos warriors controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.

traits.locale_text: ヴァランシウス家の混沌軍団を率いる{name}の最も恐ろしい戦士は、獣のような血に飢えた戦士、かつての軍団長イズドリーグ・バトシュスキー自身だった。

languages.text: 在{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯麾下的混沌大统随从中，最骇人的莫过于昔日的首席战士伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基，他宛如野兽，嗜血成性。
languages.original_text: The most fearsome of the followers of Chaos Undivided controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.

traits.locale_text: 在{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯麾下的混沌大统随从中，最骇人的莫过于昔日的首席战士伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基，他宛如野兽，嗜血成性。

languages.text: Le plus redoutable des adeptes du Chaos Indivis contrôlé par {name} von Valancius était un combattant sanguinaire qui livrait bataille avec toute la rage d'une bête : l'ancien archimilitant Izdrig Batoshski.
languages.original_text: The most fearsome of the followers of Chaos Undivided controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.

traits.locale_text: Le plus redoutable des adeptes du Chaos Indivis contrôlé par {name} von Valancius était un combattant sanguinaire qui livrait bataille avec toute la rage d'une bête : l'ancien archimilitant Izdrig Batoshski.

languages.text: El seguidor del Caos Absoluto más temible al servicio de {name} von Valancius era un combatiente bestial y sanguinario antes conocido como el Archimilitante Izdrig Batoshski.
languages.original_text: The most fearsome of the followers of Chaos Undivided controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.

traits.locale_text: El seguidor del Caos Absoluto más temible al servicio de {name} von Valancius era un combatiente bestial y sanguinario antes conocido como el Archimilitante Izdrig Batoshski.

languages.text: {name} von Valancius'un kontrol ettiği in takipçilerini Yek Kaos'un müritlerinin en korkutucusu, canavar benzeri kana susamış bir savaşçıydı. Bu, eski Başmilitan İzdrig Batoshski'nin ta kendisiydi.
languages.original_text: The most fearsome of the followers of Chaos Undivided controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.

traits.locale_text: {name} von Valancius'un kontrol ettiği in takipçilerini Yek Kaos'un müritlerinin en korkutucusu, canavar benzeri kana susamış bir savaşçıydı. Bu, eski Başmilitan İzdrig Batoshski'nin ta kendisiydi.

languages.text: Der Furcht erregendste von {name} von Valancius kontrollierte Anhänger des Ungeteilten Chaos war ein blutrünstiger Kämpfer ... kein Geringerer, als der einstige Erzmilitant Izdrig Batoshski selbst.
languages.original_text: The most fearsome of the followers of Chaos Undivided controlled by {name} von Valancius was a beast-like, bloodthirsty fighter — none other than former Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski himself.

traits.locale_text: Der Furcht erregendste von {name} von Valancius kontrollierte Anhänger des Ungeteilten Chaos war ein blutrünstiger Kämpfer ... kein Geringerer, als der einstige Erzmilitant Izdrig Batoshski selbst.
